extraction.one_line_summary: POGACAR attacked solo with 28km remaining after multiple accelerations whittled the lead group, winning by 38 seconds over HEALY
tactical_patterns: UAE Emirates controlled chase from 100km out, pacing down breakaway to set up Pogacar's late solo move
Pogacar deliberately made bike exchange when gap opened during crash, exploiting tactical opportunity before final acceleration
Decisive move came 28km out after group whittled to 10 riders, not on hardest climb but via accumulated attrition

rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: repeated accelerations to pare group before solo move mirrors Flanders winning tactic, showing sustainable Tour-style power in Ardennes format
rider_signals.HEALY Ben: positive: second place after Brabantse Pijl runner-up shows genuine Ardennes climbing progression, nearly closed to 18s post-Cauberg
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Tom: neutral: stayed with Pogacar longer than others but couldn't close gap, beat Lizenko for third on final climbs
rider_signals.TRENTIN Matteo: negative: did excessive early driving work for UAE then dropped when selection happened, tactical mismanagement
rider_signals.LIZENKO Alexey: negative: fresh off Sicily win but had nothing left in finale, faded behind Pidcock despite making lead group
